Cross Cloud

Connect with Sales Prospects and Customers

Help sales reps prioritize and engage with customers.
2 of 12 Features Configured

12 Features

Sales

Sales Cloud Everywhere

Use Salesforce across the web with the Sales Cloud Everywhere Chrome extension. Users get access to productivity tools on any web page.
In Progress
Keep Going
Cross Cloud

Agentforce (Default)

Purchase required
Help users accomplish key tasks more productively with a conversational AI assistant built into Salesforce. Agentforce (Default) handles questions posed by users in natural language and provides relevant answers drawn from secure, proprietary company data.
View a SnapshotLearn More
Sales

Einstein Sales Emails

Purchase required
Create personalized email drafts for common sales scenarios, such as introductions and follow-up notes, with Einstein generative AI.
Watch a VideoLearn More
Cross Cloud

Einstein Generative AI

Give your users capabilities powered by Einstein generative AI that help them save time, create personalized experiences, and meet their goals.
Completed
Manage
Sales

LinkedIn Sales Navigator

Give sellers key LinkedIn insights on leads, contacts, accounts, and opportunities. Sales Navigator provides embedded LinkedIn profiles so reps can target the right buyers and engage prospects.
View a SnapshotSet Up
Sales

Lead Intelligence View

Purchase required
Get lead activity and engagement metrics, see insights, take action, and update records all in one place.
View a SnapshotLearn More
Sales

Contact Intelligence View

Purchase required
Get contact activity and engagement metrics, see insights, take action, and update records all in one place.
Watch a VideoLearn More
Sales

Prospecting Center

Purchase required
Use Data Cloud in the Prospecting Center to analyze accounts, contacts and leads, and help sellers identify their most qualified prospects.
Watch a VideoLearn More
Sales

Sales Engagement

Purchase required
Create sales processes and automation, playbooks and reporting, and make it easy for sales reps to know the next step for each prospect they're nurturing.
View a SnapshotLearn More
Sales

Cadences

Purchase required
Create custom sales processes that guide sales reps through handling different types of prospects. Cadences appear for sales reps in the Work Queue, a task list that appears inside the Sales Console.
Watch a VideoLearn More
Sales

Einstein Lead Scoring

Purchase required
Help your sales team prioritize their best leads. Einstein finds patterns in your successful lead conversion history and determines which of your current leads match those patterns best.
Watch a VideoLearn More
Sales

To Do List

View, sort, and organize your tasks across accounts, contacts, cadences, and other records.
Completed

Just so you know

Information that you submit to the guidance panel can sometimes be transmitted to Trailhead, which is hosted outside your Salesforce org and subject to separate terms and conditions between you and Salesforce. If you have an existing Trailhead account associated with your work email, your in-progress and completed badges can sometimes be included.
